catalog_url.notes: Search results page with reptile-tile-list structure. Products rendered server-side.

list_page_url.notes: Browser render returns 120 product tiles. Products also visible in requests mode but with less data.

detail_url_pattern.notes: URL includes product slug and product ID. IDs can be alphanumeric or numeric.

pagination.notes: Search results page supports pagination. Need to test ?page=N parameter.

api_response_sample.source: reptile-tile HTML structure with data attributes
api_response_sample.format: HTML with data-product-id and price elements

sample_product.name: ONLY T-Shirt ONLLIVE LOVE NEW (3-tlg., 3er Pack) Figur betont, elastische Baumwollqualität

api_response_sample.notes: Product names in img alt attributes. Prices in reptile-price__priceValue elements. Images in reptile-product-image.

title.example: ONLY T-Shirt ONLLIVE LOVE NEW (3-tlg., 3er Pack)

reasons: 120 product tiles with product IDs and names
Clear URL pattern with product IDs
limitations: Product names only in alt text (not structured)
clm_suitability.recommended_approach: browser mode + HTML parsing of reptile-tile structure

blocking_issues: Product data not in structured JSON format
next_steps: Use browser mode to extract product data from reptile-tile HTML
Test detail page for richer field data
